ddls:
CREATE TABLE "editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition */,
  "edition_name" TEXT /* Name of the edition (e.g., Visual Studio Express for Windows) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the edition */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the edition was released */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the edition */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the edition is free */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., perpetual, subscription) */,
  "web_url" TEXT /* URL to the official page of the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Command line builds) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., Build, Debug, Testing) */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feature is part of a premium edition */,
  "added_in_version" TEXT /* Version in which the feature was added */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the official documentation of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_editions" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edition */,
  "supported" INTEGER /* Whether the feature is supported in the edition */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the edition where the feature is supported */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the support for the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id", "edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_requirements" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edition */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system required */,
  "processor" TEXT /* Processor required */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Memory required */,
  "disk_space" TEXT /* Disk space required */,
  "gpu" TEXT /* Graphics processing unit requirements */,
  "internet" TEXT /* Internet connection requirements */,
  "recommended_hardware" TEXT /* Recommended hardware for optimal performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edition */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language supported */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework supported */,
  "library" TEXT /* Library supported */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Specific version of the operating system */,
  "language_version" TEXT /* Specific version of the programming language */,
  "framework_version" TEXT /* Specific version of the framework */,
  "library_version" TEXT /* Specific version of the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edition being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the review was added */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_edition_id FOREIGN KEY ("edition_id") REFERENCES editions ("edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "developer_experience" TEXT /* Developer's experience level (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_editions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edition used by the user */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user installed the edition */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the user last used the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "edition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., C#) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the language */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the language was last updated */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the official documentation of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frameworks" (
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each framework */,
  "framework_name" TEXT /* Name of the framework (e.g., ASP.NET) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the framework */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the framework */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the framework was last updated */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the official documentation of the framework */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("framework_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library (e.g., Entity Framework) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the library was last updated */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the official documentation of the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edition_languages" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edition */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language supported by the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edition_frameworks" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edition */,
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* ID of the framework supported by the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id", "framework_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edition_libraries" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edition */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library supported by the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id", "library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., Performance, User-Friendly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edition_tags" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edition */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_tags" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "tag_id")
)
